Getting Started

New to Spreadsheet Moment? Start with our interactive tutorials to learn the basics.

Installation

Install Spreadsheet Moment on your local machine:

# Using npm
npm install -g spreadsheet-moment

# Using pip
pip install spreadsheet-moment

# Using Docker
docker pull superinstance/spreadsheet-moment

Cell Syntax

Spreadsheet Moment uses powerful cell syntax:

=AGENT(task, "description")
=SERIAL_READ("COM3", 9600)
=HTTP_GET("https://api.example.com/data")

Hardware Integration

Connect to Arduino, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, and more.

Deployment

Deploy to Cloudflare Workers, Docker, or desktop apps.
